revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Date Shrine (Utsunecho, Kameoka)
| native_name = 伊達神社
| image = Date-jinja (Utsunecho, Kameoka) torii.JPG
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Date Shrine (Utsunecho, Kameoka)
| coordinates = {{coord|35.014844|135.571059}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| deity = {{ill|Isotakeru|qid=Q10881556|lt=Isotakeru|ja|五十猛神|simple|Isotakeru-no-kami|zh|五十猛神|qid=Q10881556|1=Isotakeru-no-Mikoto}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Date Shrine'''|伊達神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tanba Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11368560|ltq=Q11368560|qid=Q11368560|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tanba Province}}
** Series ordinal: 12
** P155: {{ill|Q135040497|ltq=Q135040497|qid=Q135040497|1=Matsuo Shrine (Q135040497)}}
** P156: {{ill|Ooi Shrine|lt=Ooi Shrine|ja|大井神社 (亀岡市)|qid=Q11432213|1=Ooi Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q954511|ltq=Q954511|qid=Q954511|1=Tanba Province}}
* {{ill|Q11537600|ltq=Q11537600|qid=Q11537600|1=Kuwada district}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|35.014844|135.571059}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== image (P18) ==

* Date-jinja (Utsunecho, Kameoka) torii.JPG

== dedicated to (P825) ==

* {{ill|Isotakeru|qid=Q10881556|lt=Isotakeru|ja|五十猛神|simple|Isotakeru-no-kami|zh|五十猛神|qid=Q10881556|1=Isotakeru-no-Mikoto}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 182493
** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}
** P973: https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=182493#:~:text=（２）

== modern shrine ranking (P13723) ==

* {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}
** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'}
** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== Commons category (P373) ==

* Date-jinja (Utsunecho, Kameoka)

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Date Shrine|lt=Date Shrine|ja|伊達神社 (亀岡市)|qid=Q135040498|1=Date Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}

{{nihongo|'''Date Shrine'''|伊達神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tanba Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
